one_time_description: Dispute transaction claim filed April 19, 2024 with financial institution for unauthorized withdrawals of $2,009,066; investigation ongoing
economic_notes: Operates Missinippi Airways (Beaver Air Services LP, 100% owned) with revenues of $17,757,652 and net income of $4,001,193 for year ended Dec 31, 2021. Owns 44% of Keewatin Railway Co. Ltd. with revenues of $6,161,076 and net loss of $998,729 for year ended Dec 31, 2021. Various construction projects in progress including school expansion, housing units, community store, arena, water treatment plant.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to verify construction costs and expenditure completeness/accuracy. Financial statements are dated April 2, 2025 for a March 31, 2022 year-end — extremely late filing. Subsequent event: unauthorized withdrawals of $2,009,066 discovered and disputed in April 2024. Two GBEs (Beaver Air Services LP and Keewatin Railway Co. Ltd.) accounted for on modified equity basis with December 31 year-ends. No schedule of remuneration provided. Construction in progress of $14,754,612 not included in tangible capital assets net book value. Net debt position of $3,921,408.
